properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lately I've been in the Word, and long to be there more, There's a simple understanding Of things I've never seen before; It's become a brand new book to me, the Author made it real; And weeping is the only way to express the way I feel.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When I hear the Word, I embrace what's heard; I love the things so simple yet so deep, Savor every part, hold it in my heart; When I'm in the Word I read it and weep.

verse.name: v3
v4
verse.lines: The words are only letters Written on a page, But the Spirit makes it life to me, To live above a sinful age.
